overall_story_summary: Over 25 rounds, the 100-agent RPG guild maintained high momentum in daily operations. Adventurers consistently coordinated party tactics, traded supplies, repaired gear, and healed after training. The simulation successfully tested ordinary JSON actions alongside LongLive video generation for cooperative, two-person physical interactions like forge repairs, paired training, and supportive carrying.

round_summaries.story_summary: The simulation began with strong party coordination and initial supply trades.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Yuna Ashbell 005 assisted Yuna Starling with a forge repair.

round_summaries.story_summary: Agents focused on post-training recovery and gear maintenance.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Haru Ashbell healed Haru Ironleaf 030 in the dormitory.

round_summaries.story_summary: Scouts delivered reports while mages collaborated on spellwork research.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Natsu Starling researched spellwork with Natsu Mistfell in the arcane library.

round_summaries.story_summary: Physical training and tactical alignments dominated the guild hall and training yard.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Sora Dawncrest performed paired training with Sora Ashbell.

round_summaries.story_summary: Advanced magical practice and cooperative forge repairs were highlighted.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Natsu Starling synchronized a duet spell with Natsu Brightford.

round_summaries.story_summary: Infirmary support actions provided cinematic moments of camaraderie.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Toma Oakspire physically supported Toma Ashbell in the infirmary.

round_summaries.story_summary: Quest logistics formalized with visible item handoffs and continued supply trading.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Ren Silverbrook completed a visible quest handoff with Ren Ashbell.

round_summaries.story_summary: Mid-simulation momentum remained steady with gear repairs and paired training.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Kiri Starling performed paired training with Kiri Ironleaf.

round_summaries.story_summary: Agents continued to support recovering members and maintain equipment.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Toma Oakspire supported Toma Ashbell after a tiring drill.

round_summaries.story_summary: The simulation concluded with peak activity, finalizing quest handoffs and party coordination.
round_summaries.representative_interaction: Eri Ashbell presented a sealed quest parcel to Eri Emberlane.

quest_and_trade_summary: The guild economy was driven by 86 supply trades and 139 party coordination events. Agents routinely exchanged medicinal herbs, crafting materials, and rations, ensuring frontline fighters and scouts were well-equipped for their commissions.
video_prompt_chain_summary: LongLive video generation was exclusively used for cinematic, two-person cooperative actions. The prompt schedule utilized a 0-10 second chain, transitioning from an establishing action (e.g., steadying a shield, beginning a spell) to a continuous resolution (e.g., completing the repair, stabilizing the mana ribbons) while maintaining strict safety and aesthetic consistency.

notable_video_jobs.reason_to_use_longlive: To visually capture the cooperative, two-person physical interaction of a forge repair.
To depict synchronized martial arts stances during paired training.
To render the continuous visual effects of a synchronized spell duet.
To showcase the gentle, supportive physical contact of assisting an injured teammate.
To animate a clear, deliberate handoff of a quest parcel between two agents.
